branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Neutrino mass/mixing observable; matter-sector but vacuum-QFT anchored per matter-branch compliance audit

description: Neutrino-sector closure: PMNS angles and mass-squared splittings derived parameter-free from the System-R coefficients (alpha_xi=9/10, gamma=1/10, N_gen=3). Five independent quantities (theta_12, theta_23, theta_13, Delta m^2_31, Delta m^2_21) close on three theory sources (System-R + Triple-Lock topology + Gamow see-saw), all PRECISE-or-better against the NuFIT compact best-fit summary (NuFIT 6.0, Esteban et al., JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380); the most recent dataset update is NuFIT 6.1 (November 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org), which delivers chi^2 projection tables but not a compact best-fit summary in its release notes.
nufit_attribution_note: Compact best-fit numerical anchors (sin^2 theta_ij, Delta m^2_ij central values) are sourced from NuFIT 6.0 (JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380), authored by I. Esteban, M. C. Gonzalez-Garcia, M. Maltoni, I. Martinez-Soler, J. P. Pinheiro, and T. Schwetz. NuFIT 6.1 (November 2025) is the most recent global-fit update; its release notes (Papers/data/v61.release-notes.pdf) deliver chi^2 tables but, as documented in Papers/data/reference_nufit_6_1_release_contract.json, do not include a compact best-fit summary, so the v6.0 JHEP table is the canonical numerical reference until the v6.1 chi^2 tables are unpacked.

closures.name: PMNS reactor angle theta_13
closures.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit summary (Esteban, Gonzalez-Garcia, Maltoni, Martinez-Soler, Pinheiro, Schwetz; JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update (chi^2 tables only; no compact best-fit table in release notes)
closures.tier_basis: residual in theta_13 (the quantity that the structural identity fixes)
closures.method: parameter-free structural identity in System R

closures.name: PMNS solar angle theta_12
closures.structural_identity: sin^2 theta_12 = (1 - gamma)(1 + gamma/4) / N_gen (Yukawa-Damping x Generation, MD-46 closure)
closures.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (Esteban, Gonzalez-Garcia, Maltoni, Martinez-Soler, Pinheiro, Schwetz; JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380): sin^2 theta_12 = 0.308 +/- 0.012 (normal ordering); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update

closures.name: PMNS atmospheric angle theta_23
closures.structural_identity: delta theta_23 = (beta_pi - gamma)(gamma/2) sqrt(N_gen) as Sub-Generation x Cosmological-Density x TBM-Inverse compound (Lemmas 6+8); theta_23 ~ pi/4 + delta
closures.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380, normal ordering): sin^2 theta_23 = 0.546 +/- 0.021; NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update
closures.method: MD-46 closure: 2-loop compound Sub-Generation x Cosmological-Density x TBM-Inverse

closures.name: Atmospheric mass-squared splitting Delta m^2_31
closures.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (Esteban, Gonzalez-Garcia, Maltoni, Martinez-Soler, Pinheiro, Schwetz; JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380, normal ordering); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update
closures.method: Triple-Lock topology factor L_triple = Q_topo x C_geo x sigma_stab; M_R_eff = M_Pl x gap^N_levels at GUT scale

closures.name: Solar mass-squared splitting Delta m^2_21
closures.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (Esteban, Gonzalez-Garcia, Maltoni, Martinez-Soler, Pinheiro, Schwetz; JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380, normal ordering); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update
closures.method: Triple-Lock + Gamow see-saw on the lattice right-handed neutrino mass

delta_CP_closure.name: PMNS Dirac CP phase delta_CP
delta_CP_closure.structural_identity_PMNS: delta_CP^PMNS = pi (1 + gamma)(1 - gamma^2/4) (Yukawa-Damping x PMNS-Self-Energy 2-loop compound, MD-46 / MD-53 closure)
delta_CP_closure.anchor_source_PMNS: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380): delta_CP best-fit ~197 deg (normal ordering); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update
delta_CP_closure.method_PMNS: MD-46 closure: pi (1 + gamma)(1 - gamma^2/4) = 2-loop compound Yukawa-Damping x PMNS-Self-Energy on maximal CP phase (Lemmas 1+2)

alternative_F02b_CKM_closure.method: Wilson-holonomy three-extractor with coherence filter |delta^Berry - delta^largest| < 0.05 rad singling out the unique coherence-filtered lattice regime; SU(3)-holonomy closure det W = 1 makes phi_1 redundant; phi_2 the independent CP readout. The CKM Dirac phase is structurally distinct from the PMNS Dirac phase; both are reported.

framing: Five independent neutrino-sector quantities (three PMNS angles + two mass-squared splittings) close on three theory sources (System R + Triple-Lock + Gamow see-saw) with no fitted parameter; all five land PRECISE or better against NuFIT 6.1, four of them EXACT. The reactor angle theta_13 = alpha_xi/(2*N_gen) is the strongest closure: a closed-form rational identity in System R hitting NuFIT to 0.33% in theta_13 (rad). The post-MD-46/53 PMNS-promotion brings theta_12 (Yukawa-Damping x Generation), theta_23 (Sub-Generation x Cosmological-Density x TBM-Inverse), and the Dirac CP phase delta_CP^PMNS = pi(1+gamma)(1-gamma^2/4) all to EXACT tier; only Delta m^2_sol remains PRECISE.
falsification: Any of (a) sin^2 theta_13 drifting outside 0.5% on a future re-determination, (b) Delta m^2_31 drifting outside 1.5% with NuFIT update, (c) m_nu3 absolute scale measurement (KATRIN, Project 8) outside [40, 60] meV — falsifies the Triple-Lock + see-saw construction.
